title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 348.095 - Termination of authority, rights and property to vest in state — exceptions
text:
348.095.  Termination of authority, rights and property to vest in state — exceptions. — Upon termination or dissolution, all rights and properties of the authority shall pass to and be vested in the state of Missouri, subject to the rights of noteholders, bondholders, and other creditors.
(L. 1981 H.B. 681 § 20)
